settings.heading: Contact Render-Lab
settings.intro: Questions about an order, damaged shipment, production timing, collector releases, or custom work? Send a message below and include your order number if you have one.
settings.order_text: For questions about an existing order, include your order number and the email used at checkout.
settings.damage_text: If your print arrives damaged, contact us with clear photos of the packaging and product so we can review the issue quickly.
settings.collab_text: For limited releases, custom projects, or brand collaborations, send a short description of what you are looking for.
